---
title: "symbolic_legend.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\.agents\scripts\empire\symbolic_legend.py"
loc: 22
complexity: 3
logic_score: 3.57
style_score: 3.87
intel_score: 8.67
overall_score: 5.06
---

## Intent
The `symbolic_legend.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on SymbolicLegend, __init__, _load, resolve, save. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via SymbolicLegend, __init__, _load, resolve, save. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 3.6/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 8.7/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 6 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [json](file://json)
- [os](file://os)

### Exports
- `SymbolicLegend`
- `__init__`
- `_load`
- `resolve`
- `save`
